channel.title: Folia Linguistica
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Folia Linguistica

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: The pragmatics of evidentiality: markers, strategies and implications for linguistic theory
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2023-2047

item.title: Conjectural questions in Sm’algyax
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2023-2051

item.title: The epistemic conditional in polar questions as an argumentative strategy
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2023-2052

item.title: Evidentials and dubitatives in Finnish: perspective shift in questions and embedded contexts
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2024-2002

item.title: Evidential strategies in English: not just lexical
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2023-2054

item.title: Romanian presumptive in interaction: evidentiality and beyond
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2023-2049

item.title: Some notes on the role of modal particles in weil+V2-clauses in German
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2025-2004

item.title: The evidential meaning of presupposition and implicature between retractability and deniability of information
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2023-2048

item.title: The interrogative flip with illocutionary evidentials
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2023-2050

item.title: Once known, always known. Turn-final sai in North-East regional Italian
item.description: Article by Marco Biasio, Dario Del Fante DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/flin-2024-2001
